title: RefactorPlan
description: B3 — Output of the planner node. A bounded, tactic-specific plan produced before any file edits are made.

tactic_name.description: Name of the refactoring tactic to apply (e.g. extract_component, add_controlled_state). References the tactic library (B5) by name.

files_to_edit.description: Relative paths of files the edit node may modify. Must be a subset of manifest_task.allowed_edit_scope.allowed_files.

risk_level.description: Estimated risk of the transformation. High-risk plans may be held for human review.

invariants.description: Behaviours that must be preserved after the edit. Enforced by the verifier and critic.

expected_smell_resolution.description: Plain-language description of how this tactic resolves the detected smell.

abort_reasons.description: Conditions under which the edit node should abandon the attempt rather than produce a partial or risky change.
